nodes.name: Black-backed oriole
nodes.summary: Black-backed oriole（Icterus abeillei）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Black-backed oriole。

nodes.name: Black-backed oriole
nodes.summary: The black-backed oriole (Icterus abeillei) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is endemic to Mexico. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest, but it is also found in cities. It is one of the few species that can consume monarch butterflies due to evolving a tolerance to their natural poison. References
nodes.shortSummary: The black-backed oriole (Icterus abeillei) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is endemic to Mexico.
locations: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林
